zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen於1042年出生在德國賀林根時，他的父親Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen33歲，母親Cäcilie von Sangerhausen19歲。他和Adelheid von Stade至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1123年5月8日在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達享年81歲，埋葬在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen于1042年出生在德国賀林根时，他的父亲Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen33岁，母亲Cäcilie von Sangerhausen19岁。他和Adelheid von Stade至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1123年5月8日在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達享年81岁，埋葬在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: 'der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Springer'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a lively person or for a traveling entertainer, from an agent derivative of Middle English, Middle High German springen, Middle Dutch springhen, Yiddish shpringen ‘to jump or leap’. The surname of German origin is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia (see also 4 below). In part, it is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ).

English: occupational name from Middle English springer(e) ‘dancer(?), fencer(?)’; ‘one who traps animals or birds(?)’, a derivative either of Middle English springen ‘to spring up, leap’ (Old English springan) or Middle English spring ‘dance, fencing stroke, bird snare’.

English: perhaps a topographic name from Middle English springer, for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees or by a spring (Middle English spring ‘young tree, young plantation, copse’, ‘spring, source of a stream’; compare Spring ). This type of formation, where the suffix -er is added to a topographic term, is especially frequent in Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire, but no evidence has yet been found to support this derivation of Springer.

variants.name: Sprenger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eldor, Florian, Siegfried, Erwin, Franz, Frieda, Gerhardt, Helmut, Johann, Klaus, Manfred.
German: occupational name for a stoneworker, from Middle High German sprengen (causative of springen) ‘to break up, blast’.

variants.name: Kocevar
meanings: Slovenian (Kočevar): habitational name for someone from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, which is named after the city of Kočevje and this one with a derivative of hoja ‘fir tree’, altered under the influence of the German name of the city, Gottschee. From the 14th century until 1941, the year of their collective resettlement in the German Reich, a large part of the region was homeland of Gottscheers, descendants of German-speaking colonists with surnames of mixed German and Slovenian origin. See also Hocevar , compare Kochevar .

variants.name: Springman
meanings: Americanized form of South German Springmann: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Spring, Springe, Springen, or Sprink.
Americanized form of North German Springmann: occupational name for an acrobat or tumbler, from Middle Low German springen, sprengen ‘to jump or leap’ + man ‘man’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Springer , from Yiddish shpringen ‘to jump’ + man ‘man’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen was born in 1042, in Thuringia, Germany, his father, Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen, was 33 and his mother, Cäcilie von Sangerhausen, was 19. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Adelheid von Stade. He died on 8 May 1123, in Friedrichroda, Gotha, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 81, and was buried in Friedrichroda, Gotha, Thuringia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen est né en 1042, à Thüringen, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Cäcilie von Sangerhausen, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Adelheid von Stade. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1123, à Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen 1042 in Thüringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen 33 und seine Mutter Cäcilie von Sangerhausen 19. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Stade mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1123 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland und wurde in Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen è nato il nel 1042 nel Thüringen, Germania, il suo padre, Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Cäcilie von Sangerhausen, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Adelheid von Stade. Morì il 8 maggio 1123, nel Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringenが1042年にドイツスuリンジェンで生まれた時，父Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringenは33歳，母Cäcilie von Sangerhausenは19歳であった。彼はAdelheid von Stadeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1123年5月8日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサフリードリチロダで81歳で死去し，ドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサフリードリチロダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen(이)가 1042년 독일 스u링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Cäcilie von Sangerhausen(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Stade(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1123년 5월 8일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 프리드리크로다에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 프리드리크로다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen nasceu em 1042, em Thüringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Cäcilie von Sangerhausen, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Adelheid von Stade. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1123, em Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen родился в 1042 г. в местности тuринген, Германия, его отцу по имени Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Cäcilie von Sangerhausen, 19. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Adelheid von Stade. Он умер 8 мая 1123 г. в местности фриедричрода, ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности фриедричрода, ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen nació en 1042, en Thüringen, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig 'der Bärtige' von Thüringen, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Cäcilie von Sangerhausen, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Adelheid von Stade. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1123, en Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemania.
